items.caption: A father and daughter are engaged in a playful water fight in a garden. the father, dressed in a white shirt, is holding an orange water pistol, which is being aimed at the daughter. the daughter, wearing a pink shirt and a white skirt, is laughing and holding a green water pistol, which is being aimed at the father. the garden is adorned with various potted plants and a statue, creating a serene backdrop for their fun-filled activity.
